title: OCaml: /returns + /moving-averages endpoints
description: POST /returns — period returns, cumulative, mean return, Sharpe ratio. POST /moving-averages — SMA/EMA with crossover detection (golden/death cross). Brings OCaml to 10 total endpoints.
close_reason: POST /returns (period returns, cumulative, Sharpe ratio) and POST /moving-averages (SMA/EMA, crossover detection, trend). 10 total OCaml endpoints.

title: OCaml: Histogram / Binned Distribution
description: POST /histogram — Bin prices into configurable buckets, return counts/densities/cumulative. Mode bin detection, multimodal check. Simple to build, immediately useful for dashboard Chart.js visualization. Low complexity.
close_reason: Closed

title: Scaffold Phoenix app
description: mix phx.new carscope, configure Ecto for Incus Postgres
close_reason: Phoenix scaffolded, Ecto schemas, Containers module, BraveSearch client, Analytics client all created

title: OCaml: Outlier Detection endpoint
description: POST /outliers — IQR fencing, modified Z-score (MAD), Grubbs test. Returns flagged indices with severity, clean prices, thresholds. Improves data quality for all other endpoints. Reuses Stats module. Low-medium complexity.
close_reason: Closed

title: OCaml: Monte Carlo Price Simulation
description: POST /simulate — 10k simulations of future price paths using fitted depreciation + calibrated noise. Returns percentile bands (P10-P90) at future horizons. Upgrades /depreciation to confidence intervals. OCaml 5 Domain parallelism opportunity. Medium-high complexity.

title: FinanceLive + FinanceDashboardLive views
description: FinanceLive: symbol search + instruments overview table + sparklines. FinanceDashboardLive: symbol detail with stats cards, distribution, outliers, data quality, volatility, price chart. Reuse PriceChart hook and extract shared components from DashboardLive.
close_reason: FinanceLive (instrument list + search) and FinanceDashboardLive (stats, chart, volatility, quality, outliers, bars table). Routes at /finance and /finance/:id.

title: Build Phoenix LiveView search + dashboard
close_reason: SearchLive and DashboardLive created with Brave Search + price tracking

title: Cost-of-Ownership Calculator
description: Combine depreciation predictions with user inputs (insurance, fuel cost by MPG, maintenance) for total cost-to-own over N years. New cost_live.ex with form + Chart.js stacked bar.
close_reason: Separate domain, not analytics focus

title: pg_duckdb analytical queries for market-level aggregations
notes: Deferred: requires pg_duckdb apt package install in Incus Postgres container (setup-pg.sh changes), then migration + MarketAnalytics context. Architecture plan complete in agent output.
close_reason: Implemented MarketAnalytics context with market_overview, price_trends, vehicle_market_position, geographic_pricing, activity_metrics. Added MarketLive dashboard, MarketStatsRefresher GenServer, migration for pg_duckdb + materialized view, infra setup, and integrated market comparison into DashboardLive.

title: Price Drop Alerts
description: Set target price on tracked vehicle, get notified (email/in-app toast via PubSub) when snapshot comes in below threshold. Also percentage-drop alerts. Needs alerts table, GenServer or Oban job, Mailer integration.
close_reason: PriceAlert model + Watchlist.check_alerts_for_vehicle. Alert form in DashboardLive. PubSub broadcast on trigger. Alert list in WatchlistLive.

title: Similar Vehicle Recommendations
description: When viewing a vehicle, show 'You might also consider...' based on same body style, similar year, overlapping price bracket. Postgres query on vehicles + price_snapshots. Dashboard sidebar.
close_reason: Not a priority

title: Fix OCaml div-by-zero in scoring + empty std_dev
close_reason: All bugs fixed, tests passing, OCaml service builds and runs

title: Alpaca: Markets context + Alpaca HTTP client
description: Carscope.Markets context (CRUD for instruments + price_bars, price_stats reusing same SQL pattern). Carscope.Alpaca HTTP client wrapping v2 API via Req (fetch_bars, fetch_latest_quote). Use alpa_ex from github.com/phiat/alpa_ex as dep or wrap directly. Config: ALPACA_API_KEY, ALPACA_API_SECRET in .env + runtime.exs.
close_reason: Markets context (CRUD instruments + price_bars, price_stats SQL), Alpaca client wrapper using alpa_ex SDK, bar_to_row converter.

title: UI polish: Chart.js, deal score badges, listing deduplication
close_reason: UI polish: Chart.js price chart hook, IQR display, model-aware depreciation, deal score badges with confidence, dedup index migration, on_conflict:nothing in snapshot creation

title: Fix unsafe rescue blocks
description: Bare rescue _ -> nil in dashboard_live.ex (lines 83-85, 89-91, 106-108, 117-119) and market_live.ex (lines 44-46) catch ALL exceptions including programmer errors. Replace with specific error types (Req.TransportError, Postgrex.Error) and log unexpected errors. High impact.
close_reason: Closed

title: Run Ecto migration against Incus Postgres
close_reason: Migration ran against Incus Postgres, 122 vehicles confirmed

title: Listing Freshness / Days-on-Market
description: Track how long each listing URL has been seen across snapshots. Compute days-on-market. Listings sitting 30+ days are negotiable. Add stale listings filter and DOM distribution chart. Easy-medium.
close_reason: Closed

title: OCaml: Listing Freshness Decay
description: POST /freshness — Model price decay as function of days-on-market. Reuses Depreciation module curve fitting with DOM as x-axis. Returns decay rate, predictions, negotiation leverage percentages. Low complexity, max code reuse.
close_reason: Implemented as days-on-market in Postgres

title: OCaml: Risk Score
description: POST /risk-score — Composite 0-100 risk score: volatility, liquidity, depreciation, pricing, data quality factors. Flip side of deal-score. Composes existing modules with new weighting. Medium complexity.
close_reason: Overlaps with data quality grade

description: Vehicle, PriceSnapshot, SearchQuery schemas + TimescaleDB hypertable migration

close_reason: WatchlistLive at /watchlist: saved searches with name/query/schedule, run-now/pause/delete. Nav links added to SearchLive.

title: OCaml: /correlation endpoint (cross-dataset Pearson)
description: POST /correlation — Pearson correlation between two series. The cross-domain killer feature: correlate car depreciation with stock indices. Input: {series_a, series_b}. Output: {pearson_r, r_squared, sample_size}.
close_reason: POST /correlation endpoint: Pearson r, r², strength/direction labels. Built and tested.

close_reason: Brave Search client already fully implemented with price extraction, mileage parsing, source detection, and SaveResults flow in SearchLive

title: OCaml: extract common.ml from duplicated helpers
description: Extract float_of_json, extract_prices, mean, std_dev, median into common.ml. Currently duplicated across stats.ml, scoring.ml, outliers.ml, quality.ml. Prerequisite for adding new finance endpoints.
close_reason: Extracted common.ml with shared helpers. All 6 modules refactored. Built and tested all endpoints.

title: Extract shared formatting helpers (DRY)
description: format_price, format_number, format_date, format_relative_time, deal_badge_class are duplicated across search_live, dashboard_live, market_live. Extract to CarscopeWeb.Helpers.FormatHelpers and import via html_helpers in carscope_web.ex. High impact, low effort.
close_reason: Closed

title: Remove hardcoded fallback DB IP
description: dev.exs has hardcoded IP fallback for CARSCOPE_PG_HOST. Container IPs change on restart. Either require the env var or use a dynamic resolution. Low effort.

title: Export & Sharing
description: Export tracked data as CSV (NimbleCSV). Shareable read-only link for vehicle dashboard (Phoenix.Token, time-limited). New shared_live.ex for public view.

title: Phoenix LiveView dashboard: search UI, price charts, deal recommendations
close_reason: Dashboard enhanced with depreciation curve section showing annual rate, initial price, and 1/2/3/5yr predictions from OCaml service. SearchLive and DashboardLive already had search UI, stats cards, analytics, CSS chart, and price table.

title: OCaml: Optimal Buy Timing
description: POST /buy-timing — Seasonal decomposition (ratio-to-moving-average) to identify best/worst months to buy. Returns seasonal index per month, recommendation. Needs 12+ months of data. Medium complexity.

title: OCaml: Comparative Vehicle Analysis
description: POST /compare — Head-to-head 2-4 vehicles: deal scores, depreciation rates, relative value, recommendation. Orchestrates existing Scoring and Depreciation modules. Medium complexity.
close_reason: Market overview covers this

title: OCaml: Data Quality Score
description: POST /data-quality — Assess price dataset reliability: sample size, distribution normality (skewness/kurtosis), staleness, spread (CV), suspicious patterns (round numbers). Composite grade A-F. Medium complexity.
close_reason: Closed

title: pg_duckdb: bulk CSV/Parquet ingest path for price_bars
description: Justfile task to push CSV to Postgres container and bulk load via pg_duckdb read_csv(). Also add cross-domain analytical query examples (car prices vs SPY by month). This is where pg_duckdb earns its keep.
close_reason: Closed

title: Side-by-Side Vehicle Comparison
description: Pick 2-4 vehicles, see stats/depreciation/deal scores in columns. Chart.js overlays multiple depreciation lines. Batch calls to OCaml /depreciation and /deal-score. New compare_live.ex.
